tool_input.command: cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(s['id'], s['title']) for s in d['sections']]"

KDIR=/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge
for pair in \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-getting-started-create.json:s1" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-body-convert-handler.json:s4" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-body-convert-handler.json:s5" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-bean-validation-handler.json:s4" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-bean-validation-handler.json:s3" \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-resource-signature.json:s1" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json:s6"; do
  file="${pair%%:*}"; section="${pair##*:}"
  echo "=== $file : $section ==="
  jq -r --arg sec "$section" '
    . as $root |
    ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s |
    if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND"
    else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content
    end
  ' "$KDIR/$file"
  echo "=== END ==="
done

KDIR=/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && jq -r --arg sec "s6" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "NOT FOUND" else "# " + .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' "$KDIR/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json"

jq -r --arg sec "s6" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "NOT FOUND" else "# " + .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json
tool_input.description: Read universal-dao s6 - DAO setup section
